text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
There! Followed ya on Umasta! See me in your
followers now?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that! The one following 68,320 people!
Hm? You look like your jaw just hit the floor! I'm
dead!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I started following anything that looked neat and
my count exploded! My timeline is literally a flash
flood, but hey—at least it doesn't get boring. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: By the way, I like everything! So post something fun, 'kay? ☆
